Initializer# init(validation:maxDepth:maxIterations:minLossReduction:minChildWeight:randomSeed:rowSubsample:columnSubsample:)

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+macOS 11.0+tvOS 16.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init(
    validation: MLRandomForestRegressor.ModelParameters.ValidationData,
    maxDepth: Int = 6,
    maxIterations: Int = 10,
    minLossReduction: Double = 0,
    minChildWeight: Double = 0.1,
    randomSeed: Int = 42,
    rowSubsample: Double = 0.8,
    columnSubsample: Double = 0.8
)
```
